2026-06-12GACOther Than Statutory AuthorityTreaty between Canada and Japan on Mutual Legal Assistance in Criminal MattersOrder authorizing the Minister of Foreign Affairs to take the actions necessary to bring into force for Canada the Treaty Between Canada and Japan on Mutual Legal Assistance in Criminal Matters, done at Ottawa on 12 December 2025.N/A
subject: Treaty between Canada and Japan on Mutual Legal Assistance in Criminal Matters
precis: Order authorizing the Minister of Foreign Affairs to take the actions necessary to bring into force for Canada the Treaty Between Canada and Japan on Mutual Legal Assistance in Criminal Matters, done at Ottawa on 12 December 2025.
